title: HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd:
HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd!
